lines: Dukomeze gutambuka Kuko Satan’ arindira Kutubona tunanirwa Ngw atwicir' umumaro pe !
Mpisemo guhora nkizwa, Ngashingwa mu gakiza ke : Sinzava mu gakiza ke !
Bahungu, namwe bakobwa, Mukijijwe n'amaraso, Nimufash' abananiwe Bavuye ku Musaraba.
Bagabo, namwe bagore, Muze, dukizw' ibyo mu ngo, Kukw ibigusha birimo
Umv' umuhanuz' Elisa, Uko yavuye Namani; Maz' amuh' ingemu nyinshi, Elis'
Namani yarakijijwe, As him' Iman' ihoraho; Arerur’ a vug' aty' ati: I man' iba mw
Va mu kibi cya Gehazi Wakurikiy' indamu mbi! Ni we wajyany' ibibembe Bya
Abantu bose bo mw isi, A bagabo n'abagore, Bataz' ubuntu bwa Yesu, Tubah'
Twitandukanye n'ab'isi, Ngo bitume bakanguka, Bave no mu butamenya,

Namw' abakunda Siyoni, Murek' idin' ikayutse; Nta n'icyo yabamarira : Ikunda
gushimwa gusa.(Rwanda)
